examples: My heater is not getting any power and weatherman says the temperature is to fall below zero tonight.
The weatherman says a rain shower is expected this afternoon in the south.
The weatherman said that the storm was the cause of all the problems.
"I'm no weatherman, but I think we're standing in the dead center eye, " Smith said.
As the old saying goes, you don't have to be a weatherman to know which way the wind is blowing.
